description: Redesign the About page, Certifications page, Navbar, and Footer. Remove all state-specific references (AP, Telangana, etc.). Clean up excessive promotional content. Update Footer product list to include Dehydrated Products. Ensure Navbar is clean and professional with larger logo.
steps: Rewrite src/app/about/page.tsx: Remove all mentions of 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Telangana', 'AP' from hero, company intro, rice export section, mission/vision, and timeline. Replace state-specific language with generic 'India' or 'Indian farms'. Simplify the rice export excellence section - remove direct state references, keep it about quality and expertise. Shorten the timeline descriptions. Remove 'Rice-First' branding from the hero - replace with 'Premium Agricultural Exporter'. Keep the about page structure (hero, intro, rice section, mission/vision, values, timeline, CTA) but with cleaner, shorter text.

Update src/app/certifications/page.tsx: Remove 'Andhra Pradesh and Telangana' references from the export process step 1. Keep the rest of the certifications page mostly as-is since it is informative and professional. Just remove state-specific sourcing mentions.

Update src/components/Navbar.tsx: Ensure the logo is displayed at a good size (the current 84px is already decent). Keep the top bar clean. The navbar is already fairly clean - just verify no state references.

Update src/components/Footer.tsx: Update the 'Our Products' list to include 'Dehydrated Products' or 'Garlic Powder' and 'Onion Powder'. Remove any state-specific references if present. The footer looks clean already - just verify content accuracy with new product structure.
acceptance_criteria: About page has no mentions of 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Telangana', or 'AP'
Certifications page has no state-specific references
Footer product list is updated to reflect new category structure
No state-specific sourcing claims anywhere on the site
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/deekshi-global-exim and confirm it compiles successfully
Run grep -r 'Andhra Pradesh\|Telangana\|AP &\|AP/' src/ to confirm no state references remain anywhere on the site
findings: All state-specific sourcing references removed from About and Certifications pages. Footer product list updated to 7 items matching new category structure. Physical address references (Warangal, Telangana) remain in Contact page and Footer as they are legitimate business location info, not sourcing claims. Navbar was already clean with no state references. Build passes successfully.
